data.title: UnitedHealthcare Faces Scrutiny Amid CEO's Tragic Death, Industry Criticism
data.description: UnitedHealthcare's claim denial practices are under scrutiny following the murder of CEO Brian Thompson, with criticism over its profit-driven approach to care.

data.title: What's Going On With NIO Stock Friday? Mastercard In-Vehicle Payment Offering In The Works
data.description: NIO stock is rising following a partnership with Mastercard and a legal victory in its trademark dispute with Audi.
